## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (lint + typecheck + tests + build)
- [ ] New rules have positive and negative test cases
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
